case_title: BONSI, EDUARDO VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: OF THIS CASE. ROSEN-PARK WORKED FOR MUNI'S LEGAL DEPARTMENT, AND EXCUSED HERSELF FROM MY EARLIER CASE.
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, FEE EXEMPT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO CCSF-RETURNED WITH COMMENT "DOESN'T BELONG TO TAX COLLECTOR"
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BONSI, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-29-2005, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-16-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COMMISSIONER ROSEN-PARK RECUSES HERSELF FROM THE CASE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONSI, EDUARDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF REQUEST THAT THIS CASE BE HEARD BEFORE S SOMEONE OTHER THAN COMMISIONER ROSEN-PARK, OR ANY ONE ELSE WHO MIGHT BE PREJUDICED UNDER THE FACTS
CERT MAIL SENT TO CITY & COUNTY OF SF MAYOR'S OFFICE SECRETARY MAYOR'S CLERK RETURNED SIGNED
